# Kokowa Labs

> Strategic architecture partner for serious specialty coffee founders.

Kokowa Labs is a strategic coffee consultancy founded and led by Kobe Leduc. The work covers positioning, commercial logic, offer architecture, and sequencing — applied across the full specialty coffee value chain from origin to crema.

## What Kokowa Labs does

Kokowa Labs architects the business structure underneath the coffee. Most specialty coffee businesses don't fail because of their coffee quality. They fail because of weak differentiation, poor sequencing, fragile economics, and lack of strategic clarity. Kokowa Labs addresses each of these at the structural level.

The firm operates as a strategic architecture partner, not a consultant. The deliverable is a coherent business architecture — decisions made, structure built, commercial logic in place — not a deck of recommendations.

## Who it is for

Serious founders operating roasteries, cafes, direct-trade brands, and coffee-led F&B businesses. Founders scaling beyond proof-of-craft who need decision-grade strategic clarity. Engagements are selective and limited to a small number of founders per month.

## Engagements

- **Strategic Diagnostic Intensive** — A complete read of the business, the gaps, and the highest-leverage move. Single intensive engagement.
- **Coffee Business Architecture Sprint** — Differentiated positioning, offer architecture, pricing logic, and commercial sequencing for the next 12 months. Multi-week structured sprint.
- **Strategic Advisory** — Ongoing strategic partnership at the founder level. Reserved for a small portfolio of founders. Long-form engagement.

## Entry point

Every engagement begins with a structured application at kokowalabs.com/apply. Applications are reviewed personally by Kobe Leduc. Founders with strong fit receive a personal invitation to a strategic working session within 2 to 3 business days.

## Founder

Kobe Leduc — Founder and Strategic Architecture Partner. Fifteen plus years across the full specialty coffee value chain, from green sourcing decisions to roastery economics and retail architecture.

## Contact

kobe@kokowalabs.com | Application only | kokowalabs.com
